issues.description: Vision mentions 'Agent-friendly interface — clean output suitable for programmatic consumption' as a core value prop, but PRD does not have a dedicated section on agent-friendly output formatting or structured output modes
issues.from_item: Core Value Proposition #4: Agent-friendly interface — clean output suitable for programmatic consumption
issues.to_item: No dedicated PRD section for agent-friendly output; implicitly covered by deterministic command output

issues.description: Vision's near-term roadmap item 'Performance benchmarks on real filesystems' is mentioned in PRD section 3 but lacks specific benchmark targets or acceptance criteria
issues.from_item: Near-Term Roadmap: Performance benchmarks on real filesystems (mock FS benchmarks passing)
issues.to_item: PRD §3 mentions benchmarks but no specific performance targets defined

issues.description: PRD specifies detailed wc flag behavior (-l, -w, -c) and output formats (tab-separated, stdin vs file format), but Architecture does not document wc implementation details
issues.from_item: PRD §1.15: wc with -l, -w, -c flags, tab-separated output format '<count>\t<path>'
issues.to_item: Architecture does not mention wc command implementation details

issues.description: PRD specifies head and tail commands with -n flag and defaults, but Architecture does not document these commands
issues.from_item: PRD §1.13-1.14: head/tail with -n N flag, default 10 lines
issues.to_item: Architecture does not mention head/tail implementation details

issues.description: PRD specifies export command behavior, but Architecture only briefly mentions it under environment variables without detailing the command itself
issues.to_item: Architecture mentions 'export KEY=VALUE' in env vars section but no dedicated command documentation

issues.description: PRD specifies combined input+output redirection ('command < input > output'), but Architecture only mentions them separately without explicitly confirming combination support
issues.from_item: PRD §2.3: 'Combinable with output redirection: command < input > output'
issues.to_item: Architecture §Redirection: lists '> file', '>> file', 'cmd < file' separately, mentions 'combinations supported' but no detail

issues.description: Architecture mentions future split into src/shell.ts and src/commands/ if file exceeds 1000 lines (currently ~978), but no task exists for this refactoring trigger
issues.from_item: Architecture: 'If file exceeds 1000 lines, consider splitting into src/shell.ts and src/commands/'
issues.to_item: No task for file-size monitoring or refactoring trigger

issues.description: Architecture lists future enhancements (tab completion, aliases, history, signal handling) but no tasks exist for these
issues.from_item: Architecture: Future Enhancements — tab completion, aliases, history, signal handling
issues.to_item: No tasks for future enhancements (expected — these are post-roadmap items)
